mapper.select: SELECT id, report_id, tenant_id, status, reviewed_by, review_comment, reviewed_at, operation, operator_id, created_at FROM report_workflows WHERE report_id = #{reportId} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT id, report_id, tenant_id, status, reviewed_by, review_comment, reviewed_at, operation, operator_id, created_at FROM report_workflows WHERE report_id = #{reportId} ORDER BY created_at ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO report_workflows (report_id, tenant_id, status, reviewed_by, review_comment, reviewed_at, operation, operator_id, created_at) VALUES (#{reportId}, #{tenantId}, #{status}, #{reviewedBy}, #{reviewComment}, #{reviewedAt}, #{operation}, #{operatorId}, #{createdAt})
